{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230431552206F567F0CC4A18E9B4"}"},"total":2673},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7368342743168140057","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看的一本书，作者太有才了，人心人情写的入木三分。好久未看到此种书了。不知作者同样作品有否？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715578734,"group_id":"7337501820090076222","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyR1JhLZW0rkQqStZsoejw9RcmHrE5zWLxE62UPNg1ai","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3195632413320499","user_name":"用户名87808702"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3195632413320499","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7337501820090076222","book_info":{"abstract":"明朝末年，神秘的墨家绝迹于世间。
文物系大学生陈瀚，机缘巧合之下激活了墨家传承。
四百多年前的墨家神技重现于世，震惊众人。
堪称恐怖的鉴定能力，闻所未闻的古玩修复神技，
鬼神莫测的机关术数，还有逆天的中医手段…
随便在古玩街捡个漏，竟然就是国宝级！
成功引起了古玩界众多大佬的注意……
“卧槽，走宝了，走宝了！”
“真该死，那件东西连我都打眼了啊…”
“给我查！那个年轻人到底是谁！”
此时的陈瀚，已经被学校的教授盯上了。
同时盯上他的，还有各个院系的美女系花。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1245bf57e485cb6cea9c17d8a1ae36ad","author":"打刺","author_id":"","book_id":"7337501820090076222","book_name":"捡漏：开局获得墨家传承","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203048","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":17,"name":"鉴宝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=17&name=鉴宝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7337502182826050073","read_count":"41782","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1654969"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"799","tags":"都市日常,都市,鉴宝,多女主,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4b71f84bfdf1936a253b1d8843b6e08a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779395515&x-signature=7PVRh4chLGz4J3FmwtrurwinGNU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3056292808100637","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"213"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230431552206F567F0CC4A18E9B4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读13小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":95,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":47408,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":67296},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":fa
